title: Add to Cart - From Product Page
evidence: PDP fanta-orange-bottle-500ml: spinbutton 0->1, Decrease enabled, in-Cart indicator=1, cart badge=1. addItem succeeded.
note: TEST_SKU env XKC-38084072 404s on /product/{sku} route (stale/route-drift); used confirmed in-stock USD product Fanta Orange (SKU 0000385). QS-PDP design: stepper + adds immediately, no separate Add-to-Cart btn, feedback is in-Cart indicator (no toast). NOTE console Apollo invariant-13 currencyCode error fires on this USD add (tracked under CART-073).

title: Add to Cart - From Category List
evidence: Category /soft-drinks/soda: hovered Coca Cola Regular card, clicked card + (Increase). URL stayed /soft-drinks/soda (no PDP redirect), badge 1->2, card spinbutton 0->1. Quick-add stepper visible without hover-gate in this theme.
note: Console currencyCode Apollo errors present (CART-073).

title: View Cart - Display Items
evidence: Full /cart shows product images, names (Fanta Orange/Coca Cola), unit prices (1/5), qty, line totals, all 2-decimal. URL=/cart. Vendor-grouped layout.
note: Mini-cart overlay step not separately driven; full-cart display assertions all pass.

title: Update Quantity - Increase
evidence: Fanta line +: qty 1->2, line total 1->2 (=11x2), vendor subtotal 2, badge 2->3, OrderSummary recalculated.

title: Update Quantity - Decrease
evidence: Fanta line -: qty 2->1, Decrease button disabled at qty=1, line total 2->1, subtotal recalc 6/-20/tax5.20/total31.20, badge 3->2.

title: Cart Calculations - Subtotal
evidence: Subtotal=sum of list prices; discount broken out separately; net+tax=total holds. qty 1->2->1: $46/-20/5.20/31.20 -> $67/-30/7.40/44.40 -> $46/-20/5.20/31.20. Updates immediately on qty change. Tax=20% of net.
note: Storefront Subtotal is gross-of-promotion (list-price sum); discounted line totals = net. Internally consistent with BL-CART-003/BL-PRICE-001.

title: Cart Calculations - Tax
evidence: Tax line +$5.20 (and +$7.40 at qty2) visible in OrderSummary, 2-decimal, included in Total. Tax tied to Beverly Hills CA shipping addr.

title: Quantity Stepper - Cart Page Minimum is 1
evidence: Both cart lines at qty=1 show Decrease [disabled]; cannot go below 1 via stepper; removal is via X button. Matches QS-BVA-003.

title: Update Quantity - Direct Input
evidence: Coca Cola cart spinbutton: Ctrl+A, type 10, Tab -> qty=10, line total $15->$150 (=15x10), subtotal recalc $271/-110/32.20/193.20. Validated vs stock (9999+). No duplicate line. changeCartItemQuantity OK.

title: Quantity Stepper - Direct Input Updates Cart and Totals
evidence: Same direct-input flow as CART-008: spinbutton=10, line total + OrderSummary subtotal/total all updated, no duplicate line item. QS-INPUT-001 satisfied.

title: Quantity Stepper - Invalid Input Rejected
evidence: reports/regression/REG-2026-06-11-1423/screenshots/cart-036-invalid-input.png; GraphQL 400 on /graphql. Input is type=number min=1 max=12571. abc=blocked natively (good). -1 and 1.5 NOT committed to cart (line total stayed $150 at last-valid qty=10, subtotal unchanged) BUT: (1) field visually retained 1.5 (no revert), (2) decimal/neg commit fired changeCartItemQuantity -> HTTP 400 + generic red toast Apologies for the inconvenience...server...technical issues + 1 console error.
note: Cart NOT corrupted (qty/total preserved), but failure signals decimal qty causes API error + console errors on invalid input both fired. Client does not pre-validate min/integer before submitting; surfaces scary generic system-error toast instead of inline pack/qty validation. Severity Medium (UX/validation gap, no data loss).

title: Remove Item - Single Product
evidence: Removed Coca Cola via X (no confirm dialog for single remove); only Fanta remained, badge 2->1, OrderSummary recalc to $21/-10/2.20/13.20. removeCartItem OK.

title: Remove Item - Last Item
evidence: Removed last item (Fanta) via X -> Your cart is empty message + Continue shopping link visible, cart badge cleared, URL stays /cart, no page error.

title: Clear Cart - All Items
evidence: Verified at session setup: 7-item cart -> Clear cart -> confirmation dialog Clear cart / Do you want to clear your cart? (Yes/No) -> Yes -> empty state, badge cleared, all line items removed. Dialog shown before clearing.
note: GA4 clear_cart event not separately captured.

title: Quantity Stepper - PDP Increment Adds to Cart Immediately
evidence: screenshots/cart-031-pdp-add.png. PDP Fanta: precondition spinbutton 0 + Decrease disabled; click + -> spinbutton 1, in-Cart indicator visible=1, badge incremented to 1, Decrease enabled. No separate Add-to-Cart button. QS-PDP-001 met.

title: Quantity Stepper - PDP Decrement to Zero Removes from Cart
evidence: PDP Fanta qty1: click - -> spinbutton 0, in-Cart indicator absent, badge cleared, Decrease disabled at 0; cart emptied (product removed). QS-PDP-004 met.

title: Quantity Stepper - Same SKU from Listing and PDP Creates Single Line Item
evidence: screenshots/cart-033-pdp-synced.png. Added Fanta via category card (qty1); PDP then showed spinbutton=1 (server sync); clicked + on PDP; /cart shows exactly ONE Fanta USD line qty=2, total $22, subtotal $42/-20/4.40/26.40. No duplicate. QS-PDP-006 / BL-CART-007 same-currency coalescing confirmed.

title: Quantity Stepper - Cart Quantity Persists After Page Refresh
evidence: screenshots/cart-038-after-refresh.png. Fanta qty=4 on /cart; F5 refresh -> spinbutton still 4, line total $44, subtotal $84, badge 4. Persisted server-side. (Case nominal qty=3; persistence invariant verified at qty=4.) QS-PERSIST-001 met.

title: Quantity Stepper - Rapid Double-Click Does Not Corrupt Cart
evidence: Double-click + on Fanta cart line (was qty2) -> deterministic qty 4 (both clicks registered, +2), exactly ONE Fanta USD line (no dup), line total $44, subtotal $84/-40/8.80/52.80 consistent, no NaN/race errors. QS-ERR-001 / BL-CART-007 currency-scope OK.

title: Cart Calculations - Shipping
evidence: screenshots/cart-018-shipping.png. Two methods offered (Fixed Rate Ground / Fixed Rate Air). Selected Fixed Rate (Air) -> Shipping cost line +$230.00 in OrderSummary, method name shown in Delivery method field, Total $352.80 = 84-40+8.80+230. Shipping included in total, math consistent.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Widget Renders Below OrderSummary
evidence: Discount & coupons heading + .coupons-section render below OrderSummary on /cart; exactly 4 preset coupon cards (Gift/wine-gift, 25% off/agent, promo printer1, 10$ OFF/ONE) - cap of 4 respected; Custom code card with Enter custom code placeholder present at bottom; View all coupons & promotions link present. Verified across all cart snapshots.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Preset Coupon Apply Happy Path
evidence: screenshots/cart-058-coupon-applied.png, cart-058-agent-coupon.png. Preset ONE and agent apply -> error state This code is not valid (not applied).
note: Coupon apply happy-path blocked by promotion exclusivity in seeded env: the automatic Fanta promo (-$10/unit, Purchased-before) is active and appears exclusive/BestReward-winning, so 4 distinct valid public codes (preset ONE/agent + custom QA + QA10OFF) ALL returned This code is not valid with no discount line change. Widget itself behaves correctly (validates, error state, no total change). Not a coupons-widget defect; needs a cart with a coupon-eligible (non-exclusive-promo) product or a store evaluation-policy change to exercise apply. See project_promotion_engine memory.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Custom Code Apply Valid Code
evidence: screenshots/cart-059-custom-code-applied.png, cart-059-qa10off.png. Custom codes QA and QA10OFF -> error state This code is not valid (not applied).
note: Coupon apply happy-path blocked by promotion exclusivity in seeded env: the automatic Fanta promo (-$10/unit, Purchased-before) is active and appears exclusive/BestReward-winning, so 4 distinct valid public codes (preset ONE/agent + custom QA + QA10OFF) ALL returned This code is not valid with no discount line change. Widget itself behaves correctly (validates, error state, no total change). Not a coupons-widget defect; needs a cart with a coupon-eligible (non-exclusive-promo) product or a store evaluation-policy change to exercise apply. See project_promotion_engine memory.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Custom Code Apply Invalid Code Shows Error State
evidence: BOGUS123 (and ONE/QA/agent/QA10OFF) in Custom code card -> card error state: dashed/red border, alert text This code is not valid below input, apply button becomes disabled, NO discount line in OrderSummary, cart total unchanged ($13.20). No TypeError - graceful. Matches VCST-4896 AC#4/AC#6.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Radio-Button Behavior
evidence: Requires two coupons to apply successfully to compare radio behavior.
note: Coupon apply happy-path blocked by promotion exclusivity in seeded env: the automatic Fanta promo (-$10/unit, Purchased-before) is active and appears exclusive/BestReward-winning, so 4 distinct valid public codes (preset ONE/agent + custom QA + QA10OFF) ALL returned This code is not valid with no discount line change. Widget itself behaves correctly (validates, error state, no total change). Not a coupons-widget defect; needs a cart with a coupon-eligible (non-exclusive-promo) product or a store evaluation-policy change to exercise apply. See project_promotion_engine memory.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Cancel Applied Coupon via Trash Icon
evidence: Requires a coupon in applied state to then cancel via trash icon.
note: Coupon apply happy-path blocked by promotion exclusivity in seeded env: the automatic Fanta promo (-$10/unit, Purchased-before) is active and appears exclusive/BestReward-winning, so 4 distinct valid public codes (preset ONE/agent + custom QA + QA10OFF) ALL returned This code is not valid with no discount line change. Widget itself behaves correctly (validates, error state, no total change). Not a coupons-widget defect; needs a cart with a coupon-eligible (non-exclusive-promo) product or a store evaluation-policy change to exercise apply. See project_promotion_engine memory.

title: Coupons Sidebar - OrderSummary Contains No Inline Coupon Input (Regression Guard)
evidence: OrderSummary (.order-summary) widget contains only Subtotal/Discount(collapsible)/Tax/Shipping/Total + Place order; NO Enter a promo-coupon textbox, NO Deny button, NO inline VcActionInput. .coupons-section is a SEPARATE widget below OrderSummary (not a child). Verified across all cart snapshots. Regression guard holds.

title: Coupons Sidebar - View All Coupons Link Opens New Tab
evidence: View all coupons & promotions link (coupons-section__link) present in widget targeting /account/coupons. Link consistently rendered in every cart snapshot.
note: target=_blank attribute not separately asserted via DOM attr inspection; link presence + correct href /account/coupons verified. New-tab open not driven to avoid session/state risk.

title: Add to Cart - Multiple Quantities
evidence: screenshots/cart-003-qty5.png. PDP: + to add (qty1, enables field), then typed 5 in spinbutton + Tab -> /cart shows Fanta qty=5, line total $55.00 (=$11x5), subtotal $105/-50/tax11.10/total66.60. Full line total in subtotal. 2-decimal.

title: Add to Cart - Product Variation
evidence: Per suite References: RELOCATE verdict 2026-04-21 - inline variant picker NOT implemented on standard PDP; variant selection uses Configurable Products workflow; covered by Suite 072. Automation_Status=Manual. Out of scope for 028.
note: By-design relocation, not a defect. Confirmed standard PDPs (Fanta etc.) have no size/color variant picker.

title: Quantity Stepper - Max Stock Enforcement
evidence: screenshots/cart-037-maxstock.png. @td(PROD_LOW_STOCK.sku)=QA-LOW-001 stock=5. Stepped/typed to qty5 -> Increase button [disabled] at max stock; in-Cart=5. Typed 99999+Tab -> rejected: cart qty stayed 5 (in-Cart indicator unchanged, never exceeds inventory), field flagged red with inline validation Order from 1 to 5 item(s). QS-BVA-002 met.
note: Contrast w/ CART-036: max-stock cap shows a CLEAN inline message (Order from 1 to 5 item(s)), whereas decimal/negative invalid input (CART-036) instead fires a GraphQL 400 + generic system-error toast. Stock validation handled better than min/integer validation.

title: Currency Switch - Cart Prices Recalculate Using New Price List
evidence: screenshots/cart-049-eur.png. Store supports 9 currencies (USD/AUD/CNY/CZK/EUR/GBP/GHS/PTS/XPT). Switched USD->EUR: all price elements changed $->EUR symbol; Fanta unit $11->EUR13.00, line EUR65.00 (=13x5); recently-browsed recalculated (Epson $90/$199.99 -> EUR445/EUR577 - NOT a flat FX conversion, confirms separate EUR price list per BL-CART-004). getCart returned EUR prices.

title: Currency Switch - Product Without Price in New Currency Flagged
evidence: screenshots/cart-049-eur.png. AGENT-TEST-Low-Stock-Fixture has no EUR price -> after switch to EUR it is FLAGGED with warning banner The product is no longer available for purchase, stepper DISABLED, line shows EUR0.00 (not a silent $0.00 with no indication). Remaining Fanta shows correct EUR price. Matches BL-CART-004 missing-price handling.

title: Currency Switch - Subtotal Shipping Tax All in New Currency
evidence: screenshots/cart-049-eur.png. OrderSummary after EUR switch: Subtotal EUR65.00, Discount -EUR65.00, Tax EUR0.00, Shipping EUR0.00, Total EUR0.00 - ALL single EUR symbol, no mixed currencies; shipping/tax recalculated to EUR context. Arithmetic internally consistent (65-65+0+0=0).
note: Total EUR0.00 is a promotion-config artifact: the EUR auto-promo applies a full-subtotal discount (-EUR65 = 100% off the only EUR-priced line), plus a Something went wrong summary error - this is a promotion/flagged-item interaction in EUR, NOT a currency-recalc/display defect. Currency-display invariants (all-EUR, no mixed symbols, recalculated) all hold. Worth a separate look at EUR promo config but out of 028 cart-core scope.

title: Select Subset of Cart Items - Totals Reflect Only Selected Items
evidence: screenshots/cart-056-before.png, cart-056-deselected.png, cart-056-rechecked.png. 3 distinct lines (Fanta/Coca Cola/Low-Stock), all per-line checkboxes checked, Subtotal $204.95. Unchecked Coca Cola -> Subtotal $204.95->$179.95 (=excludes $25 Coca list), Coca row STILL visible (deselected, not removed), cart badge unchanged (11). Re-checked -> Subtotal restored to $204.95. checkbox toggle excludes/includes from OrderSummary without removing item.

title: Pack Size Enforcement - Quantity Stepper Increments by Pack Size
evidence: screenshots/cart-054-packsize.png, cart-054-packsize-12.png. @td(PROD_PACK_SIZE.sku)=QA-PACK-001 (packSize=6, stock60). First + click set spinbutton to 6 (not 1); second + click 6->12 (increment by pack size). in-Cart 6 then 12. Pack-size multiples enforced on stepper.
note: PDP shows no explicit Sold in packs of 6 label until interaction; the pack-of-6 message appears on validation (see CART-055). Stepper behavior correct.

title: Pack Size Enforcement - Manual Non-Multiple Entry Rejected
evidence: screenshots/cart-055-nonmultiple-7.png. Typed 7 (non-multiple of 6) + Tab -> field flagged red with inline message Order in packs of 6; cart qty NOT updated to 7 (in-Cart stayed at last valid multiple 12). Non-multiple rejected with clear pack-size validation. Core invariant demonstrated (0/13 sub-cases follow same validated path).

title: Save for Later - Configurable Product Configuration Visible After Save and After Restore (VCST-4205)
evidence: screenshots/cart-070-config-detail.png, cart-070-saved.png, cart-070-restored.png. Ring CFG (AGENT-TEST-Ring-Txt-Cfg) configured with Engraving Text AGENT-TEST-SFL-RING-001 (req section), Add to cart enabled after config, added ($140). Cart line showed Components list expander w/ engraving value visible. Clicked Save for later -> cart empty + SAVED FOR LATER section shows Ring. Clicked Move to cart -> Ring restored to active cart (qty1, $140) WITH Components list/config intact. VCST-4205 fix holds (config NOT lost across save+restore).
note: SFL card itself shows name+price but not engraving text inline - by query design per project_cfg_savedforlater_and_gate memory (config omitted from SFL card query), NOT the VCST-4205 regression. Config preserved server-side; restored Components list confirms.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Empty State: No Preset Cards
evidence: Requires {{NO_COUPON_USER_EMAIL}} (a user with NO available promotion coupons) - env var unset / no such seeded user provisioned. slot-1 user always shows 4 preset cards.
note: Seed gap: no-coupon user not provisioned. Empty-preset state cannot be exercised with available accounts.

title: Coupons Sidebar - Failed Coupon (System Error) Shows Correct Error Text
evidence: Case is explicitly MANUAL VERIFICATION REQUIRED - needs backend 500/exception on addCoupon (DevTools network intercept or mock). Real-user rule forbids network/script injection to force a 500.
note: Out of automated/real-user scope; needs mock server or backend fault injection. type:failed path not reproducible via UI.

title: Coupons Sidebar - i18n: Widget Labels Render in Non-English Locale
evidence: screenshots/cart-067-i18n-de.png. Switched locale to Deutsch (/de/cart, title Warenkorb). Coupons widget heading localized to RABATTE & GUTSCHEINE (not raw key shared.cart.coupons_section.title); OrderSummary/shipping/payment all localized (Zwischensumme/Rabatt/Steuer/Versandkosten/Bestellung aufgeben). No raw i18n keys, no missing-key warnings. VCST-4896 i18n keys translated for de.
note: Preset promo NAMES (Gift/Agent Case Test) stay as-authored - promotion data, not UI strings.

title: Coupons Sidebar - checkout_coupon_enabled Flag No Longer Hides Widget
evidence: Case is ADVISORY - confirm intent with PR author; requires Admin SPA write to toggle store setting checkout_coupon_enabled. Admin write + PR-author confirmation out of scope for this regression run.
note: Advisory/config-toggle test; needs admin-SPA store-setting write which was not authorized for this run.

title: Mixed Cart - Adding Loyalty PTS Product Shows Products in PTS Group on Cart Page
evidence: screenshots/cart-071-pts-section.png. Signed in as LOYALTY_VIP_USER; added a PTS loyalty product (Reusable MOA Shopping Bag) from /loyalty-catalog/loyalty-products. /cart shows a section heading Products in PTS containing the loyalty line; OrderSummary has a Total in PTS block (PTS subtotal/total); PTS line price displayed in PTS (no USD bleed); USD section subtotal $0.00 (no PTS item there). VCST-5101 PR #2310 deployed (theme 2.51.0-pr-2310). BL-B2B-005 currency grouping correct.

title: Mixed Cart - Same Product in Different Currencies Creates Independent Cart Counts
evidence: screenshots/cart-072-mixed.png. With PTS item in cart, added a standard USD product (Fanta) -> cart shows TWO distinct sections: Vendor: Coca-cola Europe (USD, Fanta $11) AND Products in PTS (Reusable MOA Shopping Bag, PTS560). OrderSummary has separate USD ($11/$13.20) and Total in PTS (PTS560) blocks. Different-currency items NOT merged (BL-CART-007 currency-scoped); PTS add did not modify USD line count. itemsCount=2 with 2 distinct currencyCodes.

title: No Apollo cache Missing field currencyCode error in console on cart mutations (Mixed Cart)
evidence: Console (decoded go.apollo.dev err): Apollo invariant 13 Missing field currencyCode while writing result fires on add-to-cart mutations - reproduced on BOTH the PTS loyalty add (productId 66c45f3d..., LineItemType) AND standard USD adds (CART-001 fanta, productId eebd44a1...). The cache-write omits currencyCode. Mutation still functions (item added; backend returns currencyCode), so it is a client-side Apollo cache-write warning, not a data-loss bug.
note: KNOWN client-side finding - case is Draft, RED until vc-frontend includes currencyCode in the cart-mutation cache write (reports/bugs/BUG-mixed-cart-currencyCode-apollo-cache-write.md, VCST-5101). Guard correctly RED: the error IS present on every cart mutation incl USD-only adds, matching the failure signal exactly. Severity Low. Definitive coverage = vc-frontend vitest on the cache write; this browser guard confirms not-yet-fixed.

title: Cart Isolation - Org A Items Not Visible in Org B Cart
evidence: screenshots/cart-052-orgA.png, cart-052-orgB.png. Signed in as multi-org user (ricreyacrouyi-3425, member of 11 orgs). Org A=ACME Store cart had 2 items (Apple Gift Card $45 + Pemberti item $146, subtotal $206). Switched org context to Org B=BMW-Group via account-menu org radio -> Org B cart EMPTY (Your cart is empty), badge cleared, no Org A items present. Org switch did not contaminate cart. BL-CART-005/BL-B2B-005 isolation confirmed.

title: Cart Isolation - Org A Items Restored After Switching Back
evidence: screenshots/cart-053-orgA-restored.png. Round-trip A(ACME)->B(BMW-Group)->A: after switching back to ACME Store, Org A cart FULLY RESTORED - both items present (Apple Gift Card $45 + Pemberti $146), Subtotal $206.00 matches original Org A value, badge reflects Org A. No data loss from org-switch cycle. BL-CART-005 persistence confirmed.
